name: Recipefork Chef Ingredients Display
description: Chef Mode ingredient presentation surface with scale controls and measurement-system-aware rendering.

scaled.description: Ingredient list with recipe scaling controls and converted quantity display.

slots.header: Section label and Chef Mode badge

visual_brief: A clean ingredient list optimized for Chef Mode recipe detail pages. Scaling controls sit above the ingredient list, and each ingredient row foregrounds quantity and unit before the ingredient name and preparation note.
